name: consent.create
description: Create a JIT (Just-In-Time) consent request for tool execution. Returns a user code that must be approved via dashboard, CLI, or VS Code.

user_id.description: User ID who must approve the consent.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool requiring consent.

context.description: Optional context metadata for the consent request.

expires_in.description: Time in seconds until the consent request expires (default: 600 = 10 minutes).

verification_uri.description: URL where the user can approve the consent.

expires_at.description: ISO timestamp when the request expires.
